name: fix_compile_error
description: Detect build errors, find matching fixes, apply and retry until clean build

steps.description: Get known error patterns and fixes
Run build to capture fresh error output
Extract Rust error codes from output
Fast check for type errors (faster than full build)

layers.name: known_error
layers.description: Match error message against knowledge base
layers.action: Look up error in osdev.json or rust.json. If found, apply the suggested fix and rebuild.

layers.name: search_project
layers.description: Search project files for similar patterns or past fixes
layers.action: grep for the error text in src/ files to find where it occurs. Search memory/learned.json for past fixes.

layers.name: web_search
layers.description: Search the web for the error
layers.action: web_search with the error code and relevant context. Apply top suggestion. Rebuild.

layers.name: report
layers.action: Return all build output, all attempted fixes, and their results.

post_condition: cargo build --release --target x86_64-unknown-uefi returns exit code 0
